name: luci-theme-md3e
description: Material Design 3 Expressive-inspired OpenWrt LuCI theme built with Vite and TailwindCSS

scripts.build: npm run assemble && node scripts/clean.js && vite build
scripts.format: prettier --write package.json vite.config.ts scripts/*.js src/shared/*.js docs/*.md
scripts.format:check: prettier --check package.json vite.config.ts scripts/*.js src/shared/*.js docs/*.md
scripts.verify: npm run format:check && npm run verify:source-parts && npm run assemble:check && npm run verify:release && npm run verify:breakpoints && npm run verify:assets && npm run verify:templates && npm run verify:licenses && npm run verify:local-artifacts && npm run verify:login-fallback && npm run verify:critical-selectors && npm run verify:page-outline && npm run verify:generated && npm run verify:terser && npm run verify:tailwind && npm run verify:css-budget && npm run verify:cross-repo-sync
